explanations.1: This is YAML frontmatter—metadata at the top of the file that tells the site generator about the page's title, image, and author.
explanations.3: This setting prevents the automatic table of contents from showing on this page.
explanations.8: This imports a CSS file to style elements that appear later on the page.
explanations.12: This comment tells the markdown linter to ignore a specific rule for this file so it doesn't complain about formatting.
